response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Multi-Column Pricing Comparison Table **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Environmental Contrast (HIGH), Cognitive & Neurodivergent (MEDIUM), Magnification & Reflow (MEDIUM) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access, Keyboard & Motor, Screen Reader & Semantic --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | MAJOR | 5 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None of the escalated perspectives fully passed. All have critical findings. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role #### **Front-End Dev** 1. **Tier price subtext contrast fails at 4.54:1** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.3 2. **Feature availability relies solely on color (green X/red X)** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 1.4.1 3. **"Recommended" column uses background color only** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1 4. **Feature tooltips only trigger on hover, not keyboard focus** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.5.3 5. **"Most popular" badge animation lacks prefers-reduced-motion override** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.3.1 #### **Visual Design** 1. **Tier price subtext (12px #767676) is borderline readable at 4.54:1 contrast** — Environmental Contrast — MINOR — 1.4.3 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None. All findings are code-level and confirmed from source. --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** — MAJOR findings present. Address before shipping. --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Tier price subtext (12px #767676) has 4.54:1 contrast ratio — barely meets AA for normal text but fails for visually small/light text **WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum) **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .tier-price { font-size: 12px; color: #767676; } **Fix:** Increase font size to 14px or use darker #4a4a4a to achieve 4.5:1 contrast ``` ``` **Finding:** Feature availability indicators use color-only (✓/✕) with no pattern/shape difference **WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .feature-check.available { color: #38a169; } / .unavailable { color: #e53e3e; } **Fix:** Add pattern overlays (e.g., checkmark with green border, X with red border) or text labels ``` ``` **Finding:** "Recommended" column uses background color only without text label **WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .recommended-header { background: #ebf8ff; } **Fix:** Add "Recommended" text label inside column header ``` ``` **Finding:** Feature tooltips only appear on hover, not keyboard focus **WCAG:** 2.5.3 Label in Name **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (primary) (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** .feature-tooltip-trigger:hover .feature-tooltip { display: block; } **Fix:** Add :focus-within selector and ensure tooltip is accessible via keyboard ``` ``` **Finding:** "Most popular" badge animation lacks prefers-reduced-motion override **WCAG:** 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (primary) (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** @keyframes shimmer { ... } (no @media (prefers-reduced-motion) override) **Fix:** Add media query to disable animation when reduced motion is preferred ``` ``` **Finding:** Tier price subtext (12px #767676) is borderline readable at 4.54:1 contrast **WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum) **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .tier-price { font-size: 12px; color: #767676; } **Fix:** Consider increasing to 14px or using #4a4a4a for better readability ``` --- ## Technical Implementation Notes 1. **Contrast Fix Example:** ```css .tier-price { font-size: 14px; /* From 12px */ color: #4a4a4a; /* From #767676 */ } ``` 2. **Non-Color Indicators for Features:** ```jsx {value ? ( ✓ ) : ( ✕ )} {value ? 'Available' : 'Not available'} ``` 3. **Keyboard-Accessible Tooltip:** ```css .feature-tooltip-trigger:focus-within .feature-tooltip { display: block; } ``` 4. **Reduced Motion Handling:** ```css @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .most-popular-badge { animation: none; background-position: center; } } ``` 5. **Recommended Label Addition:** ```jsx
{tier.name} {tier.recommended && (Recommended)}
``` --- ## Severity Justification - **MAJOR** for all color-only indicators and motion issues: These create complete barriers for users with color vision deficiencies and vestibular disorders. - **MINOR** for borderline contrast: While passing AA, the small text size and light weight make it a readability concern for some users. --- ## ARRM Role Mapping | Finding Type | Primary Owner | Secondary Owner | |---|---|---| | Contrast ratios | Visual Design | Front-End Dev | | Color-only indicators | Visual Design | Front-End Dev | | Motion sensitivity | UX Design | Front-End Dev | | Tooltip accessibility | Front-End Dev | UX Design | | Text labels | Content Author | Front-End Dev | --- ## Component-Specific Recommendations 1. **For Visual Design:** - Add text labels to "Recommended" column - Use pattern overlays for feature availability indicators - Increase price subtext font size to 14px 2. **For Front-End Dev:** - Add :focus-within to tooltips - Implement prefers-reduced-motion override - Add non-color visual indicators for feature cells 3. **For Content Authors:** - Add "Recommended" text label to column header - Consider adding brief explanations for feature availability in tooltips 4. **For UX Design:** - Ensure consistent interaction patterns for tooltips - Review animation usage for all interactive elements --- ## Final Status **Component Status:** Requires revision **Critical Path:** Address all MAJOR findings before shipping **Next Steps:** 1. Visual Design team to implement non-color indicators and text labels 2. Front-End Dev to fix tooltip accessibility and motion handling 3. Content Authors to add "Recommended" text label 4. Re-run audit after fixes to confirm resolution
